detail: Loose requires at least one side (or AB) to declare this.
Both sides or AB canonical interface required.

A_value: A.in:bathymetry; initial t / s fields; surface forcing winds; heat; freshwater flux; initial; boundary conditions for ocean state variables; optionally; biogeochemical feedback fields from planktom10.; biogeochemical feedbacks influencing physical light climate or fluxes | B.in:temperature t; salinity s; 3d velocities u; v; w; mixed layer depth mld; shortwave radiation at depth; sea ice cover / thickness; physical ocean state variables from nemo; physical drivers for biogeochemistry
hydrostatic, boussinesq approximations; finite-difference discretization; fixed bathymetry
B_value: stoichiometric phytoplankton growth; temperature, light-dependent production rates; multiple plankton functional types
AB_value: dynamic tracer exchange; dms production is influenced by plankton, light; no feedback from atmosphere modeled in this setup
detail: A→AB:0.00 (covered: —) | B→AB:0.21 (covered: light, plankton, production) | A∪B→AB:0.21 (covered: light, plankton, production) | uncovered_AB: atmosphere, dms, dynamic, feedback, influenced, is, modeled, no, setup, this, tracer

required_check: A or B must equal AB exactly

AB_value: nemo compiled with planktom10 tracer package
shared grid from nemo e.g., 1° or 1 / 4°
